# Arte

8955 Collins Ave Surfside FL 33154

8.96

MCI RANK

Completed in 2020, Arte Surfside is an ultra-luxury, oceanfront condominium building located at 8955 Collins Avenue in Surfside, Florida. Developed by Sapir Corp, Arte has just 16 condo residences comprised of three-, four-, five-, and six-bedroom floor plans ranging in size from 3,126 to 7,681 interior square feet (see [Arte Surfside floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/arte-surfside-condos/floor-plans "Arte Surfside floor plans")). Arte was designed by Italian master architect Antonio Citterio (his first project in the United States) while the building’s landscape design was done by one of the world’s leading landscape architecture firms, Enzo Enea. Rising 12 stories, Arte Surfside offers direct views of the Atlantic Ocean from every apartment in the building. The kitchens at Arte feature Poliform cabinetry, Gaggenau appliances, and Italian marble countertops. Arte condo residences, designed for indoor and outdoor living, have expansive terraces clad in travertine with ipe decking that seamlessly blend into modern, open living areas.

Episode 11: A Tour of Residence 801 at Arte Surfside - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Episode 11: A Tour of Residence 801 at Arte Surfside](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1bRzPN5gGE) [Miami Real Estate TV](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCyDEUmfTBcmggUGFeD2HoXw)

Miami Real Estate TV3.46K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1bRzPN5gGE)

Arte residents enjoy a number of luxe amenities, such as a 75-foot indoor swimming pool, an outdoor swimming pool and sundeck, a rooftop tennis court, a state-of-the-art fitness center and yoga studio, sauna, steam room, meditation pond, children’s playroom, residents’ lounge with billiards table, catering kitchen, and temperature-controlled parking spaces.

Arte condominium is located near the southern end of [Surfside](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/surfside-condos "Surfside"). Its location puts it within walking distance of a Publix grocery store, [The Surf Club Four Seasons](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/the-surf-club-four-seasons-condos "The Surf Club Four Seasons"), Starbucks, and Bal Harbour Shops. By car, Arte Surfside is 25 minutes from South Beach, 30 minutes from the Miami International Airport, and 45 minutes from the Fort Lauderdale Airport.

# Arte, a one-of-a-kind collection of 16 exquisitely finished oceanfront residences, is the first-ever project in the United States by the legendary Italian architecture and design partnership of Antonio Citterio and Patricia Viel in collaboration with Kobi Karp Architecture and Interior Design.    Arte embraces its privileged setting in Surfside, an exclusive seaside enclave celebrated for its historic architecture and wide, tranquil beaches. Every residence enjoys spectacular ocean views from private terraces that celebrate outdoor living in a warm, Mediterranean style, as well as first-class services and amenities that rival the world’s most luxurious beachfront resorts.
